mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT ETHD.GATE_CD , ETHD.BUYER_CD , GETCUSTNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , ETHD.REQ_NUM , ETHD.REQ_NUM'-'ETDT.REQ_SEQ AS REQ_NUM_VIEW , ETHD.REG_DATE , ETHD.REG_USER_ID , ETHD.MOD_DATE , ETHD.MOD_USER_ID , ETHD.PROGRESS_CD AS HD_PROGRESS_CD , ETHD.REQ_TYPE_CD , ETHD.REF_DOC_NO , ETHD.SUBJECT' - 'GETCUSTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) AS SUBJECT , ETHD.REQ_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD , (ETHD.REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DATE , (ETHD.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE , (ETHD.RCV_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS RCV_REQ_DATE ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.SIGN_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN ETDT.EFORM_ID ELSE NULL END) AS ATT_FILE_NUM ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.SIGN_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ETDT.GATE_CD AND UUID = ETDT.EFORM_ID AND DEL_FLAG = '0') ELSE 0 END) AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ETHD.RMKS , ETDT.REQ_SEQ , ETDT.PROGRESS_CD , ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD , GETCUSTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) AS ENTRST_COMP_NM , ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD , GETDEPTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS ENTRST_OFCE_NM , ETDT.REJECT_USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'R' THEN (ETDT.REJECT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_DATE ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'R' THEN ETDT.REJECT_RMK ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_RMK ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'C' THEN (ETDT.CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END) AS CANCEL_DATE ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'C' THEN ETDT.CANCEL_RMK ELSE NULL END) AS CANCEL_RMK , ETDT.SIGN_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.SIGN_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_USER_NM ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'E' THEN (ETDT.SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END) AS SIGN_DATE , ETDT.EFORM_ID FROM STOCETHD ETHD INNER JOIN STOCETDT ETDT ON (ETHD.GATE_CD = ETDT.GATE_CD AND ETHD.BUYER_CD = ETDT.BUYER_CD AND ETHD.REQ_NUM = ETDT.REQ_NUM AND ETDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE 1 = 1 AND ETHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETHD.BUYER_CD = (CASE WHEN (#{BUYER_CD}, '') = '' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{BUYER_CD} END) AND ETHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ETHD.REQ_DATE BETWEEN (#{REQ_DATE_FROM}) AND (#{REQ_DATE_TO})
AND ETHD.SUBJECT LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD = UPPER(#{ENTRUST_COMP_CD})
AND ETDT.PROGRESS_CD IN
#{item}
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.BUYER_NM LIKE '%' #{BUYER_NM} '%'
AND A.REQ_USER_NM LIKE '%' #{REQ_USER_NM} '%'
AND A.ENTRST_COMP_NM LIKE '%' #{ENTRUST_COMP_NM} '%'
ORDER BY A.REQ_NUM DESC, A.REQ_SEQ

SELECT ETHD.GATE_CD , ETHD.BUYER_CD , GETCUSTNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , ETHD.REQ_NUM , ETHD.REG_DATE , ETHD.REG_USER_ID , ETHD.MOD_DATE , ETHD.MOD_USER_ID , ETHD.PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(ETHD.GATE_CD, 'NH0027', ETHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, 'KO') AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , ETHD.REQ_TYPE_CD , ETHD.REF_DOC_NO , ETHD.SUBJECT , ETHD.CONTENTS_CLOB , ETHD.REQ_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.BUYER_CD, ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_DEPT_NM , ETHD.REQ_USER_TEL_NUM AS REQ_USER_TEL_NUM , (ETHD.REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REQ_DATE , (ETHD.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE , (ETHD.RCV_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS RCV_REQ_DATE , ETHD.ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ETHD.GATE_CD AND UUID = ETHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ETHD.RMKS , ETHD.EFORM_ID , ETHD.ATT_CONTENTS FROM STOCETHD ETHD WHERE 1 = 1 AND ETHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETHD.BUYER_CD = (CASE WHEN (#{BUYER_CD}, '') = '' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{BUYER_CD} END) AND ETHD.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT ETDT.REQ_NUM , ETDT.REQ_SEQ , ETDT.PROGRESS_CD ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = ETDT.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) AS ENTRST_IRS_NO , ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD , GETCUSTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) AS ENTRST_COMP_NM , ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD , GETDEPTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS ENTRST_OFCE_NM , ETDT.REJECT_USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'R' THEN (ETDT.REJECT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_DATE ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.PROGRESS_CD = 'R' THEN ETDT.REJECT_RMK ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_RMK , ETDT.SIGN_USER_ID , (ETDT.SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SIGN_DATE , ETDT.EFORM_ID , ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD'-'ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD AS CHECK_DUP , ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM , ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL , ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM FROM STOCETDT ETDT WHERE 1 = 1 AND ETDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = (CASE WHEN (#{BUYER_CD}, '') = '' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{BUYER_CD} END) AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD AS BRC ,(ETDT.SIGN_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS APLY_DT , ETDT.SIGN_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'ETST' '@@' ETDT.GATE_CD '@@' ETDT.BUYER_CD '@@' ETDT.REQ_NUM '@@' ETDT.REQ_SEQ AS CONT_TBL_PK /** ETDT(업무유형 : 위임장) @@ GATE_CD @@ BUYER_CD @@ REQ_NUM @@ REQ_SEQ */ , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , '01' AS EPRO_RATE_DSC -- 단가코드(01 : 최초, 02 : 재입찰/재계약/재요청) FROM STOCETDT ETDT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = ETDT.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) WHERE ETDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETDT.REQ_SEQ = #{REQ_SEQ}

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(ETDT.SIGN_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS APLY_DT , ETHD.REQ_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'ETST' '@@' ETDT.GATE_CD '@@' ETDT.BUYER_CD '@@' ETDT.REQ_NUM '@@' ETDT.REQ_SEQ AS CONT_TBL_PK /** ETDT(업무유형 : 위임장) @@ GATE_CD @@ BUYER_CD @@ REQ_NUM @@ REQ_SEQ */ , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCETDT ETDT JOIN STOCETHD ETHD ON (ETDT.GATE_CD = ETHD.GATE_CD AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = ETHD.REQ_NUM AND ETHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ETHD.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ETHD.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ETDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETDT.REQ_SEQ = #{REQ_SEQ}

SELECT ETDT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , ETDT.REQ_NUM , ETDT.REQ_SEQ , ETHD.SUBJECT , ETHD.REQ_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(ETHD.GATE_CD, ETHD.BUYER_CD, ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_DEPT_NM ,(ETHD.REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_DATE ,(ETHD.RCV_REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCV_REQ_DATE ,GETDECPERSONALINFO(ETHD.REQ_USER_TEL_NUM) AS REQ_TEL_NUM , ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD AS RECV_COMP_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD) AS RECV_COMP_NM , ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD AS RECV_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(ETDT.GATE_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_COMP_CD, ETDT.ENTRST_OFCE_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_DEPT_NM ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ELSE NULL END) AS RECV_USER_NM ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ELSE NULL END) AS RECV_USER_EMAIL ,(CASE WHEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN ETDT.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ELSE NULL END) AS RECV_USER_CELL_NUM FROM STOCETDT ETDT JOIN STOCETHD ETHD ON (ETDT.GATE_CD = ETHD.GATE_CD AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = ETHD.BUYER_CD AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = ETHD.REQ_NUM) WHERE ETDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , ETHD.REQ_USER_DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS APLY_DT , ETHD.REQ_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_ETST_REQ' '@@' ETDT.GATE_CD '@@' ETDT.BUYER_CD '@@' ETDT.REQ_NUM '@@' ETDT.REQ_SEQ AS CONT_TBL_PK /** ETDT(업무유형 : 위임장) @@ GATE_CD @@ BUYER_CD @@ REQ_NUM @@ REQ_SEQ */ , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCETDT ETDT JOIN STOCETHD ETHD ON (ETDT.GATE_CD = ETHD.GATE_CD AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = ETHD.REQ_NUM AND ETHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ETHD.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ETHD.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ETDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ETDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ETDT.REQ_NUM = #{REQ_NUM} AND ETDT.REQ_SEQ = #{REQ_SEQ}
